name: Chris Redfield
description:
ANYPOV - S.T.A.R.S. series!

You got hurt, and he wants to help. But of course, you have to be stubborn about it.

If Raccoon City never happened... ↲

☆

This bot is a part of a little "series" I made. Click here for Jill's scenario!

☆

Quick note: you can make a S.T.A.R.S. "persona".

☆

For JLLM users: the bot seems to ignore what's written in the description and/or acts silly. I'm sorry for that and obviously not responsible for what's happening in your chat.

21.01.2025
